violations.text: Raw animal foods (chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (meatballs) in the display case. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
Poultry was cooked to 156 degrees Fahrenheit. Poultry must be cooked to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
Inspector observed cracked thermometer on deli display case. TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES shall be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of flour in the meat area. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. Walk-in cooler (deli area) door gaskets were observed torn. 2. Sealing machine (deli area) were observed torn with gaps throughout base. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the produce area is in poor repair. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

The floor in the produce area is in poor repair, observed missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per interview with PIC, work order has been submitted. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

The hand-washing sink in the prepared foods area was blocked by a cart and cleaning supplies. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

The door to the outside, located in the receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
Preparation sink in deli area was observed leaking and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
